message:
Fix TLA+ Next disjunction formatting: first disjunct missing \/ prefix

The export_behavior method generated invalid TLA+ syntax for traces with
2+ events: the first disjunct used plain indentation while subsequent
disjuncts used \/ prefix. SANY requires all disjuncts at the same level
to use the same operator. Now all disjuncts consistently use \/ prefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
